recommended_action: OPERATOR ACTION NEEDED: (1) Check systemd journal for why all 4 processes restarted at ~17:40Z (journalctl -u ict-trader-live --since '17:30' --until '18:00'). (2) Verify tick data feed reconnected post-restart — no heartbeat in 1h47m strongly suggests the WebSocket/data connection did not re-establish. Manual reconnect or service restart may be needed.
